notes: The governed Stage2 writer now defaults to MDEC084 v2 bucket/child allocation when no explicit output path is supplied. Explicit legacy --run-id remains compatibility-only.
Maintained wrapper-nondefault writer now defaults to v2 and passes an explicit output run-dir into the governed Stage2 entrypoint. Explicit legacy --run-id remains compatibility-only.
Maintained wrapper-nondefault Stage5 writer now defaults to v2. Script remains non-canonical for pipeline authority.
Default planning output now resolves to a future-facing v2 child path. Explicit legacy mode remains available through --naming-mode legacy or explicit --run-id.
Shared writer helper now resolves explicit legacy compatibility writes or default v2 bucket/child targets without changing read compatibility.

blocker: Legacy compatibility pointer by design; it does not create data/results run surfaces and is retained only for legacy helper workflows.
